description: Optional AI security review via a second Ollama call (default same model). Required for `/!` strict mode, `/` for risky-write/unknown classifications, `/x` benign-write unless policy disables it for speed, and any command touching cloud, git mutation, packages, sync, or remote URLs. AI review can raise risk but cannot lower a static block.
notes: Document the review system prompt in `docs/SAFETY.md` (doc-01) so the heuristic is auditable.
steps: TDD: Static-blocked command remains blocked even if AI review says `risk = low`.
TDD: AI review `risk = high` raises a static-benign result.
TDD: AI review failure prevents `/x` execution for write operations (§6.11 last bullet).
TDD: Cache hit by command hash + policy version + review model (§9.11).
Author `Public/Invoke-SlashOpsSecurityReview.ps1` issuing a chat call with the review-system prompt and the candidate command.
Apply the cannot-lower rule downstream of static block (saf-06 enforces).
Tests mock `Invoke-OllamaChat` and assert raise/cannot-lower behaviour.
name: [saf-05] AI security review (second model call)
